title: Greek Politician Is Prosecuted for Admitting Drug Use Decades Ago
author: Ephrat Livni and Niki Kitsantonis
fullText: The leftist party of Yanis Varoufakis, a former finance minister and critic of the conservative government, said he had been charged based on admitting he had tried ecstasy once.
summary: The leftist party of Yanis Varoufakis, a former finance minister and critic of the conservative government, said he had been charged based on admitting he had tried ecstasy once.
